compliance_note: ships only when the EOI phase is active; re-clear against live conditions. Non-binding expression of interest only. No payment, no commitment, no allocation, no priority, no minimum. Verbatim CSF warning retained. Re-run the full compliance battery against live offer conditions before this phase goes live.
angle: Democratisation / access (EOI, Aubrey Blanche category validation)
hook_type: Cadence + 'none from VCs' punch into a third-party validation excerpt (interest-only frame)
tactic: Numbers + no-gatekeeper punch -> Aubrey Blanche category quote -> non-binding interest ask
motivation: Access + democratisation + third-party credibility + low-friction signal
primary_text:
324 raises, $234M+, none from VCs.

"Crowdfunding opens up the ability to invest in excellent businesses to a significantly broader set of investors." Aubrey Blanche.

That is what 137,000 Australians did on our platform. Now we are opening our own Crowd-Sourced Funding raise.

If that interests you, lodge a non-binding expression of interest. No payment, no commitment, and you decide nothing until you read the offer document.

Indicate your interest. We will tell you the moment the offer goes live.

*Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
headline: 324 raises, $234M+, none from VCs
description: Non-binding. No payment, no commitment. Indicate your interest.
_source_label: DRC V5 -- E5 Democratisation / Access (EOI, first-timers, phase-gated)
_iterates: BIRCHAL-V5-W5 democratisation angle, re-framed for the EOI phase regime.
_v5_rationale: Uses QUOTE-006 ad_safe excerpt verbatim, attributed 'Aubrey Blanche' (no invented title). Third-party CSF-category validation, not a Birchal claim; sits as an external voice before the Birchal proof.
Hook Halbert 5/5 in --primary-text mode (cadence + no-gatekeeper punch). EOI regime does not force a softer hook here.
'invest in excellent businesses' is inside Blanche's attributed quote (her word, exempt). The reader's action is the non-binding interest signal, not a transaction.
EOI language: 'lodge a non-binding expression of interest. No payment, no commitment'. No allocation/priority/minimum/preferential.
_drc_audience: B2C considered, solution-aware. First-time CSF investors, EOI phase.
_compliance_findings_resolved: EOI regime: 'lodge a non-binding expression of interest', 'no payment, no commitment', 'indicate your interest'. Allowed EOI language only.

STILL HARD-BLOCK clear: no 'first in line', no priority access/allocation, no 'secure/reserve your allocation/place/spot in the raise', no 'shares allocated to early registrants', no minimum, no 'same terms as institutional/insiders', no 'be first in the queue'. Zero matches.
BANNED-CSF-PHRASES (waitlist set): zero matches. No 'invest/buy/subscribe now' as a CTA. 'invest in excellent businesses' is inside Blanche's attributed verbatim, not a reader instruction.
VERBATIM-OFFER-LANGUAGE: 'we will tell you the moment the offer goes live'. No 'we will send'.
VERBATIM-CSF-WARNING: byte-exact final line, appears exactly once.
QUOTE-006: Aubrey Blanche ad_safe excerpt verbatim (contiguous sub-span), attributed 'Aubrey Blanche', no invented title. CSF-category validation, not merged with any Birchal stat.
Subject discipline: 'Birchal' appears zero times in body; 'our platform' / first-person we/our; one referent.
Number traceability: 324=PLAT-001, $234M+=PLAT-002, 137,000=PLAT-003. No market-share / #1 / first claim.
